all.en: This brief outlines the upcoming summer campaign for our new beverage line.
all.zh: 本簡報概述我們新飲品系列的即將上線夏季活動。

all.en: The campaign will run for six weeks across three major social platforms.
all.zh: 本活動將於三大社群平台上持續六週。

all.en: Our primary audience consists of urban professionals aged twenty five to thirty four.
all.zh: 我們的主要受眾是二十五至三十四歲的都會專業人士。

all.en: The secondary audience includes college students who follow lifestyle creators.
all.zh: 次要受眾包含追蹤生活風格創作者的大學生。

all.en: The core message centers on refreshment during busy weekday afternoons.
all.zh: 核心訊息聚焦於忙碌平日午後的清新提振感受。

all.en: We will adopt a bright color palette inspired by tropical fruit and ocean tones.
all.zh: 我們將採用受熱帶水果與海洋色調啟發的明亮配色。

all.en: Short form video will serve as the main creative format on every channel.
all.zh: 短影音將作為各管道的主要創意格式。

all.en: Each video should be fifteen to thirty seconds long with captions enabled.
all.zh: 每支影片應為十五至三十秒長並啟用字幕。

all.en: We plan to publish three posts per week on Instagram and TikTok.
all.zh: 我們計畫於 Instagram 與 TikTok 每週發佈三則貼文。

all.en: Facebook will receive two posts weekly plus boosted carousel ads.
all.zh: Facebook 每週將獲得兩則貼文加上加強推廣的輪播廣告。

all.en: Paid media budget for the full campaign is set at fifty thousand dollars.
all.zh: 本活動全期付費媒體預算設定為五萬美元。

all.en: Organic content production will be handled by our in house creative team.
all.zh: 自然觸及內容製作將由我們的內部創意團隊負責。

all.en: We will partner with four micro influencers to extend authentic reach.
all.zh: 我們將與四位微型網紅合作以延伸真實的觸及範圍。

all.en: A branded hashtag will tie all user generated content together.
all.zh: 一個品牌專屬主題標籤將串連所有使用者生成內容。

all.en: Engagement rate and saved posts will be our two leading performance indicators.
all.zh: 互動率與貼文收藏數將是我們的兩項主要績效指標。

all.en: Click through rate from paid ads should reach at least two percent.
all.zh: 付費廣告的點擊率應至少達到百分之二。

all.en: Customer service will monitor comments daily to respond within four hours.
all.zh: 客服將每日監控留言以於四小時內回覆。

all.en: Weekly performance dashboards will be shared every Monday morning.
all.zh: 每週成效儀表板將於每週一上午分享。

all.en: Mid campaign optimization is planned for the end of the third week.
all.zh: 活動中期優化規劃於第三週週末進行。

all.en: Underperforming creative will be paused and replaced with stronger variants.
all.zh: 表現不佳的創意將被暫停並以更強的版本替換。

all.en: All assets must comply with our updated brand voice guidelines.
all.zh: 所有素材必須遵循我們最新版的品牌語調指南。

all.en: Legal review of every promotional claim is required before publishing.
all.zh: 每則促銷主張於發佈前皆須經法務審查。

all.en: A final wrap up report will be circulated within two weeks after the campaign ends.
all.zh: 最終總結報告將於活動結束後兩週內傳閱。

all.en: Please send your feedback on this brief by the end of Thursday.
all.zh: 請於週四下班前提供您對本簡報的回饋。
